scan_not_identified: Badeecada lama garan karo. Isku day raadin.
scan_failed: Iskaanku waa fashilmay. Isku day raadin.
payment_failed_retry: Lacag-bixintu waa fashilantay — fadlan isku day mar kale
network_error: Khalad shabakadeed — hubi xiriirkaaga oo isku day mar kale
location_denied: Goobta waa la diiday. Aad Dejinta → boggan → oggolow Goobta si aad u calaamadiso goobta iibka.
location_tap_enable_title: Taabo si aad u furto goobta calaamadaha khariidadda
tap_enable_location: Taabo si aad u furto goobta
shift_variance_detected: Tirinta lacagtu ma waafaqsana wixii la filayay (waxay ku duwan tahay {amount}). Ku dar sabab si aad u xirto shiftka.
shift_variance_reason_placeholder: tusaale sarafka la siiyay lacag jeexan
shift_close_failed: Shiftku ma xirmi karo. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
tap_to_photograph: Taabo si aad u sawirto badeecada
start_typing_to_search: Bilow qorista si aad u raadiso kaydkaaga
note_placeholder: tusaale sonkor la'aan, caano oat, dhexe...
how_customer_wants_to_pay: Sidee macmiilku u rabaa inuu bixiyo?
scan_qr_to_pay: Iskaan QR si aad u bixiso
oversold_warning: ⚠️ Waxaa la iibiyay kayd ka badan: {items}. Cusboonaysii kaydka.
cancel_confirm: Nadiifi {heading}? Dhammaan alaabta waa la saari doonaa.
receipt_send_failed: Rasiidka lama diri karo — hubi xiriirkaaga oo isku day mar kale
setup_open_shift: Fur shiftkaaga si iibka maanta loogu tiriyo kaashkaaga — taabo halkan
setup_no_products: Weli badeeco lama darin. Wali waad iibin kartaa — sawir alaabta, ama qor magaceeda oo gacanta ku dar.
setup_no_payments: Kaadhka & lacagta mobiilka weli lama dejin — waad qaadi kartaa kaash. Milkiilaha ayaa ka furi kara Biilalka.
checkout_payments_not_setup: Kaadhka iyo lacagta mobiilka weli lama heli karo. Ka beddel qaad kaash, ama weydiiso milkiilaha inuu dhammaystiro dejinta lacag-bixinta.
offline_sale_saved: Xiriir ma jiro — iibkan waa lagu kaydiyay qalabkan wuxuuna si toos ah u soo bixi doonaa marka aad dib online noqoto.
practice_card_title: Cusub? Isku day iib tababar ah
practice_card_body: Baro kaashka hal daqiiqo gudaheed. Waa mid la iska dhigayo — waxba lama kaydiyo lamana diro meelna.
practice_hint_home: Taabo badhanka weyn si aad u bilowdo iib
practice_hint_add: Taabo badhanka kamarada — waxaan iska dhigi doonnaa inaan iskaan gareyno badeeco
practice_hint_cart: Hubi alaabta iyo lacagaha, ka dibna taabo Bixi
practice_hint_checkout: Qor lacagta kaash ah ee macmiilku ku siiyay, ka dibna dhammaystir iibka
practice_hint_receipt: Waa dhammaaday! Kaasi wuxuu ahaa tababar — waxba lama diiwaangelin
practice_receipt_note: Iib tababar ah — waxba lama kaydin. Taabo badhanka hoose si aad u dhammaysato tababarka oo aad si dhab ah u iibiso.
payment_timed_out: Lacag-bixintu wakhti dhaaftay. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
payment_declined: Lacag-bixinta waa la diiday. Isku day hab kale.
cardpay_tap_to_pay: taabo si aad qalabka ugu bixiso
cardpay_waiting: Waxaa la sugayaa in macmiilku bixiyo...
updates_automatically: Si toos ah ayuu u cusboonaysiimayaa
mpesa_send_failed: Codsiga lacagta mobiilka lama diri karo
mpesa_popup_hint: Macmiilku wuxuu heli doonaa fariin taleefankiisa si uu u galo PIN-ka lacagta mobiilka
mpesa_prompt_sent: Codsiga lacagta mobiilka waa loo diray
mpesa_enter_pin: Weydiiso inuu galo PIN-ka lacagta mobiilka si uu u xaqiijiyo
payment_failed_or_timeout: Lacag-bixintu waa fashilantay ama wakhti dhaaftay
copilot_hint: Wax kasta i weydii oo ku saabsan iibkaaga, kaydkaaga, ama macaamiishaada.
offline_banner: Waad offline tahay — iibka kaashka wali wuu shaqeeyaa. Kaadhka & lacagta mobiilka waxay u baahan yihiin xiriir.
